M/01/2010~^^^^t] sfsfft ^ R , f^MT (TT ^ ^ ) ftt^trft : *R#q *fa ^ J *<r*PI ^ ^ ^JfdH w f t ^ ^ atfSRJ^T W ^I.3TT. 918(3?), f^n% 12 3TW, 2004, ^T.3TT. 24(3T), faffe? 5 ^H3$, 2005, ^T.3n. 667(3?), fcffe* 9 ^ , 2006, ^T.3TT., 2005(3T), fem 29 W ^ , 2007 ^ST.3T1. 2981(3T), 1^1% 29 l<¥^{, 2008, ^T.3TT. 3077(3?), t^TF* 30 W*TC, 2009 ^ TOT ^£ T R ^ ^f MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 1 st December, 2010 S.O. 2882(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (2) read with sub-section (I) of Section 5A of Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, I960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Animal Welfare Board of India consisting of the following persons as its Members, with effect from the date of publication of this notification, namely:— 1. Director General of Forests, Ministry of Environment and Member (ex-officio) under Section 5( 1 )(a) Forests, New Delhi 2. The Animal Husbandry Commissioner, Ministry of Agriculture, Member (ex-officio) under Section 5( 1 )(b) New Delhi 3. Shri Sada Kant, JS (Police II)—Representative of Ministry of Member under Section 5( 1 )(ba) Home Affairs 4. The Representative of Ministry of Human Resources Member under Section 5(1 )(ba) Development 5. Shri A.K Srivastava, Inspector General of Forest Member under Section 5(1 )(bb) (Wildlife), Ministry of Environment & Forest 6. Maj Gen(Retd)Dr. R.M. Kharb, 3767, Sector-23, Member under Section 5(l)(bc) Gurgaon,-122017. 7. Dr. S. Chinni Krishna, 398, TTKRoad, Chennai-600018 Member under Section 5( 1 )(bc) 8. Ms. Jasjit Purewal, B-5/197, Safdarjung Enclave, New Member under Section 5(l)(bc) Delhi-110029. 9. Dr. Arun Varma, M.V.Sc, Ex. ADG, ICAR B-4, Sector-12, Member under Section 5( 1)(c) NOIDA-20130UU.P. 10. Dr. (Mrs.) M. Lahkar, MBBS, MD, Professor Government Member under Section 5( 1)(d) Medical College, Gauhati. -- 2 of 3 -- [m II—sro3(ii)] *TR?T 3>T I H M ^ : 31^IINKUI II. 12. 13. 14. 15. 16. Dr. Sunil Kumar, Dy. Director fncharge, Central Research Institute (H), A-I/i Sector-24, NOIDA,(U.P) Representative ofCCRH. Member under Section 5(1 )(d) Member under Section 5( 1 )(e) Member under Section 5( I)(e) Member under Section 5(1X0 Representative of Municipal Corporation of Kolkata Representative of Municipal Corporation of Gurgaon Smt. Amala Akkineni, Representative of Blue Cross of Hyderabad Smt. Norma Alvares, Representative of Peoples for Animals Goa Member under Section 5(l)(f) Member under Section 5(1 X0 Shri Guljari Lai Soni, Representative of Rajasthan Pinjrapole Society, Fathehpur 17. Mrs. Anjali Sharma, Representative of SPCA, NOIDA 18. Shri Doulat Jain, Representative of SPCA, Chennai 19. Dr. J.C. Kochar, Representative of SPCA, Chandigarh 20. Shri Hem Pande, IAS, Joint Secretary, (Animal Welfare), Ministry of Environment and Forests, Government of India 21. Shri Rajiv Gupta, IAS, Government of Uttrakhand 22. Shri Asgar Samoon, IAS, Government of J & K The Central Government hereby nominates Maj. General (Retd.) Dr. R.M. Kharb, AVSM, Member to be the Chairman and Dr. S. Chinni Krishna, Member to be the Vice Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India as per sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act. [F.No.ll/l/2010-AWD] ANJANI KUMAR, Director (AW) Note:—The earlier notification regarding reconstitution ofthe Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0.2005(E), dated 29-11-2007, S.0.2981(E), dated 29-12-2008 and S.0.3077(E), dated 30-11-2009.
